# Keycloak 2FA Email Authenticator

> A Keycloak SPI plugin that adds email-based OTP two-factor authentication.
> Supports Keycloak SMTP, SendGrid, AWS SES, and Mailgun.
> Compatible with Keycloak 26.x. Requires Java 21+.

## Installation

- Download JAR from Maven Central
  - groupId: io.github.mesutpiskin
  - artifactId: keycloak-2fa-email-authenticator
  - version format: <plugin-version>-KC<keycloak-version> (e.g. 26.4.0-KC26.6.1)
- Copy JAR to <KEYCLOAK_HOME>/providers/
- Run: <KEYCLOAK_HOME>/bin/kc.sh build
- Restart Keycloak

## Authentication Flow Configuration

- Keycloak admin → Authentication → Flows → duplicate Browser flow
- Add "Email OTP" execution inside the Forms sub-flow
- Set requirement: REQUIRED (all users) or use "Conditional Email OTP" (role-based)
- Bind the new flow as the Browser flow

## Authenticator Settings (⚙️ on Email OTP row)

- Email Provider: KEYCLOAK | SENDGRID | AWS_SES | MAILGUN
- Code length: 6 digits (default)
- Time-to-live: 300 seconds (default)
- Simulation mode: false — when true, logs OTP to server output instead of sending email (dev only)
- Resend cooldown: 30 seconds (default)
- Max code attempts: 5 (default)
- Enable Fallback to Keycloak SMTP: recommended true in production

## Email Provider Credentials

- KEYCLOAK: no credentials needed, uses realm SMTP settings
- SENDGRID: API key (starts with SG.) + verified from-email + optional from-name
- AWS_SES: Access Key ID + Secret Access Key + region (e.g. us-east-1) + verified from-email
- MAILGUN: Private API key (starts with key-) + sending domain + from-email + region (US or EU)

## Source Layout

- src/main/java/                                        — authenticator SPI implementation
- src/main/resources/theme-resources/templates/html/   — FreeMarker email template (variables: ${code}, ${ttl})
- src/main/resources/theme-resources/messages/         — i18n properties (en, tr, fr, de, es, it, da, ru, az, ar, zh_TW)

## Docs

- Full documentation: https://mesutpiskin.github.io/keycloak-2fa-email-authenticator/
